Power Automate

Microsoft's cloud-based automation service for business workflows

7/10Overall Rating
6/10Ease of Use
$15/moStarting Price
2016Founded

About Power Automate

Power Automate is a ai automation platform founded in 2016. It positions itself as “Microsoft's cloud-based automation service for business workflows” and is best suited for Microsoft 365 users, enterprises, Office heavy workflows. Pricing starts at $15/mo.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Visual BuilderYes
Code SupportYes
Api ConnectionsYes
SchedulingYes
Conditional LogicYes
Error HandlingYes
Team CollaborationYes
TemplatesYes
Webhook SupportYes
Ai ActionsYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Deep Microsoft ecosystem integration
  • Desktop and cloud automation combined
  • Included in many Microsoft 365 plans

Cons

  • Best value only within Microsoft stack
  • UI can feel clunky and slow
  • Confusing licensing tiers
